name: iris-mcp
description: High-precision Windows desktop control for AI agents.
long_description: Iris is an MCP server that lets LLMs see, find, and click real UI on Windows with sub-pixel accuracy on mixed-DPI multi-monitor setups. Three rendering backends (Win32 spatial, UIA semantic, OCR vision) behind one resolver, so it works on apps that hide from accessibility trees (Tkinter, custom Qt, OBS dock widgets, Resolume panels). Includes clipboard, process, notifications, window state, and registry tools. Comes with a live accuracy bench that lets users verify the click-precision claims on their own machine.

tools.name: iris_status
tools.description: Backend availability, OCR + UIA readiness, DPI mode, cache stats.

tools.name: self_test
tools.description: Run the 15-check battery against a built-in Tk harness.

tools.name: find_window
tools.description: Match a single window from a spec.

tools.name: focus
tools.description: Bring a window forward and get a FocusToken.

tools.name: wait_for
tools.description: Poll for text/state changes with backoff.

tools.name: click
tools.description: Find + click with optional UIA-invoke fast path.

tools.name: mouse_click
tools.description: Click at point or current position.

tools.name: launch
tools.description: Start an app from the registry.

tools.name: clipboard_get
tools.description: Read text from the Windows clipboard.

tools.name: clipboard_set
tools.description: Write text to the Windows clipboard.

tools.name: kill_process
tools.description: Terminate a process by PID. Requires force=True.

tools.name: window_restore
tools.description: Restore a window to normal size.

tools.name: window_close
tools.description: Politely close a window via WM_CLOSE.

tools.name: registry_list_values
tools.description: Enumerate values under a registry key.

tools.name: registry_write
tools.description: Write a registry value. Requires confirm=True.

tools.name: registry_delete_value
tools.description: Delete a registry value. Requires confirm=True.
